---
title: "README"
description: "UIAO repository README — rendered from the canonical README.md at the repo root."
categories: [meta]
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Canonical source
This page renders the canonical
[`README.md`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/README.md)
at the repository root.
:::

{{< include ../../README.md >}}
